goal: Wire the tree-sitter parser/extractor into knowledge_graph persistence so a file-change event produces a WAL-batched upsert of all extracted symbols as entities.
plan_summary: Add a new `executor` module in `ucil-daemon` that consumes file paths (abstracted so the test can call it without a live file watcher), parses each file with `ucil_treesitter::Parser`, extracts symbols with `ucil_treesitter::SymbolExtractor`, maps each `ExtractedSymbol` to a `ucil_core::knowledge_graph::Entity` with `source_tool="tree-sitter"`, and upserts the whole batch inside a single `KnowledgeGraph::execute_in_transaction(|tx| …)` so every file's symbols land under one WAL transaction (master-plan §18 Phase 1 Week 4 line 1759). The frozen acceptance-test selector `executor::test_treesitter_to_kg_pipeline` exercises the pipeline on one or more files under `tests/fixtures/rust-project/` and asserts that (a) entities are present in the KG after the run (via `list_entities_by_file`), (b) they carry the tree-sitter provenance, (c) re-running the pipeline on the same file is idempotent (uses the existing `upsert_entity` `ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE` path), and (d) the whole batch is atomic (one transaction per file).
scope_in: New module `crates/ucil-daemon/src/executor.rs` (or `executor/mod.rs`) — public surface restricted to what the acceptance test + future `find_definition` caller need.
Pipeline function: given one or more file paths on disk, parse + extract + batch-upsert into `KnowledgeGraph` in one transaction per file.

Mapping `ExtractedSymbol` → `Entity` (kind from `SymbolKind`, qualified_name from `ExtractedSymbol::qualified_name` when present, file_path, start_line/end_line, signature, doc_comment, language, source_tool="tree-sitter", source_hash from a content-hash of the span so re-indexing the same file is a no-op by invariant).

Unit test `executor::test_treesitter_to_kg_pipeline` in `crates/ucil-daemon/src/executor.rs` under `#[cfg(test)]`, hitting the fixture `tests/fixtures/rust-project/src/lib.rs` (or another already-shipped rust-project file) and asserting entities are reachable via `KnowledgeGraph::list_entities_by_file`.
Exported item(s) in `ucil-daemon/src/lib.rs` via a `pub mod executor;` + minimal `pub use` so the test selector compiles.
Rustdoc on every public item, referencing master-plan §18 Phase 1 Week 4 line 1759 and CLAUDE.md invariants about WAL batching and no mocks.
Errors surfaced via a crate-local `ExecutorError` enum with `#[derive(thiserror::Error)]` and `#[non_exhaustive]`.
scope_out: Wiring the pipeline into the live `FileWatcher` loop — next WO can wire watcher → executor once the pipeline itself is green.
Relation edges (`calls`, `imports`) — F04 scope is entities only; edges belong to later W4/W5 features.
Serena / LSP enrichment — scope of P1-W5-*.
Multi-file concurrency / Salsa integration — Salsa skeleton P1-W3-F04 already passes; integration with executor is not required to flip F04.
Any change to `feature-list.json`, `flip-feature.sh`, `scripts/gate/**`, or the master plan.
acceptance: `executor` module exists with real implementation (no `todo!`, `unimplemented!`, stub Default::default or bare-literal returns).
Pipeline runs end-to-end against a real fixture rust file and inserts entities the test retrieves via `KnowledgeGraph::list_entities_by_file`.
Pipeline upserts within a single `execute_in_transaction` per file (WAL batching invariant).
Running the pipeline twice on an unchanged file is idempotent (entity count in KG stable).
Workspace clippy clean under `-D warnings`; fmt clean; cargo doc clean.
acceptance_criteria: cargo nextest run -p ucil-core knowledge_graph:: (no regression in F02/F03)
cargo doc -p ucil-daemon --no-deps produces zero warning/error lines
context_refs: master-plan:§18 Phase 1 Week 4 line 1759 ("Wire tree-sitter extraction → knowledge graph population")
